# Test basic fuzzing functionality without external servers
# This tests the core fuzzing components

# Test that fuzzing packages exist and can be imported
exec go list ./fuzzing
stdout 'github.com/tmc/mcp/exp/mcpscripttest/fuzzing'

# Test basic fuzzing generator
exec go test -v -run TestFuzzGenerator ./fuzzing
stdout 'TestFuzzGenerator'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test coverage feedback mechanism
exec go test -v -run TestCoverageFeedback ./fuzzing
stdout 'TestCoverageFeedback'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test specialized generators
exec go test -v -run TestSpecializedGenerators ./fuzzing
stdout 'TestSpecializedGenerators'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test smart generator
exec go test -v -run TestSmartGenerator ./fuzzing
stdout 'TestSmartGenerator'
stdout 'PASS'

# Test visualization
exec go test -v -run TestVisualization ./fuzzing
stdout 'TestVisualization'
stdout 'PASS'
